description: Content anchored to specific restaurant locations with detailed menu items, pricing, and personal ratings. Creators tag exact locations and reference nearby landmarks to drive local discovery and foot traffic.
structural_recipe: Open with location name and exit/landmark reference (e.g., 'Off White / Exit 5 after Tala Mall'). Credit photographer/account. List 3-5 menu items with prices in SAR and personal ratings (X من 10 scale). Include dish quality assessments. Use location tag and geotag in post metadata.
why_it_works: Saudis use Instagram as a local discovery tool for F&B. Specific pricing and location details reduce friction in decision-making. Personal ratings build trust and mimic word-of-mouth recommendations. Landmark references help users navigate Riyadh's car-centric geography. Transparent pricing aligns with value-conscious consumer behavior.
transplantation_caveats: Pricing must be current—outdated prices damage credibility
Location landmarks should be recognizable to target neighborhood audience
Ratings scale (X من 10) culturally specific; may need localization outside Saudi Arabia
Must include proper photographer/account credit to maintain community trust
cultural_constraints: Location specificity is essential—vague references underperform
Pricing transparency is expected and appreciated in F&B content
Rating scale should use familiar Arabic numerical format
